hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); cmd=$(printf "%s" "$input" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if printf "%s" "$cmd" | grep -qE "git commit"; then if printf "%s" "$cmd" | grep -qE "(feat|fix|docs|style|refactor|perf|test|build|ci|chore|revert)(\([^)]*\))?!?:"; then exit 0; fi; printf "{\"decision\": \"block\", \"reason\": \"Use /commit instead of raw git commit\"}\n" >&2; exit 2; fi'
